education.institution: Institute of Distance and Open Learning (IDOL)

experience.description: Build and maintain end-to-end fintech applications using the full MEAN stack, design and deliver scalable RESTful APIs with sub-200ms response times, architect the DealTouch Website Builder, establish a shared Angular component library, and translate product requirements into reliable systems.

Designed and developed scalable frontend features using React.js and Next.js, built responsive UI components, integrated third-party REST APIs, resolved production issues, and contributed to code reviews and knowledge-sharing.

projects.name: InfraPulse – Distributed Backup & Restore Orchestration System
projects.description: Architected a multi-tier distributed backup platform with fault-tolerant workflow orchestration via Temporal, end-to-end backup pipeline with encryption and storage promotion, and a metadata-driven job tracking system in PostgreSQL.

projects.name: DealTouch Website Builder
projects.description: Designed a nested content model, implemented a drag-and-drop visual editor with multi-device preview, enforced data normalization pipelines, and delivered a production platform for business customers.

projects.name: Node.js Snippets – VS Code Extension
projects.description: Published a VS Code extension with production-ready snippets for server setup, routing, and JWT authentication, reducing project bootstrap time from hours to minutes.

projects.name: Angular ZardUI CLI – NPX Package
projects.description: Developed an npx CLI tool to scaffold Angular + Tailwind CSS + Zard UI projects in seconds, automating project initialization, dependency installation, and responsive starter pages.

projects.name: Production Websites – React / Next.js
projects.description: Designed and delivered 4 client websites optimized for Core Web Vitals, mobile responsiveness, and SEO using Next.js SSR/SSG patterns, dynamic routing, and schema markup.
